programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2012 NFC Divisional Round: Seahawks vs. Falcons
programme.desc: Matt Bryant's late field goal stuns Seattle Seahawks and lifts the Atlanta Falcons to a playoff win.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2009 NFC Wild Card: Packers vs. Cardinals
programme.desc: Relive the 2009 NFC Wild Card Round matchup between the Green Bay Packers and the Arizona Cardinals where Karlos Dansby returned Rodgers' fumble 17 yards for a touchdown to give the Cardinals a 51-45 victory over the Packers.

programme.title: NFL Media Originals
programme.desc: This Pride Month, the NFL honors Richard Fierro for his acts of bravery as he and other survivors of the shooting share their stories of healing, the importance of safe spaces and their hope for unity in the future.

programme.title: NFL 360
programme.desc: Raiders linebacker Carl Nassib comes out as gay and helps transform lives, and Super Bowl champion Osi Umenyiora helps Nigerian prospects escape dramatic hardships.

programme.title: NFL Films Presents
programme.sub-title: Jeff Rohrer, Esera Tuaolo, Vince Lombardi - Pride Month
programme.desc: Jeff Rohrer, Esera Tuaolo, and Vince Lombardi are LGBTQ+ allies in sports, advocating for visibility and acceptance. Celebrate their contributions during Pride Month.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2005 AFC Divisional Round: Steelers vs. Colts
programme.desc: Despite a 15 point fourth quarter from the Indianapolis Colts, the Pittsburgh Steelers ended with 21-18 victory to advance to the AFC title game.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Watch the matchup between the New York Jets and the New England Patriots during the 2010 Divisional Round where the New York Jets reached their second straight AFC championship game with a stunning 28-21 win over the New England Patriots.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: Identical twins Tiki and Ronde Barber dominate the game of football but end their careers in very different ways.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Tiki Barber ran for 234 yards and three touchdowns as he carried the New York Giants offense to a 34-28 victory over the Washington Redskins.

programme.title: NFL Mic'd Up
programme.desc: Super Bowl Champion Peyton Manning as heard on the field and sidelines.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.desc: Von Miller and the Denver defense torment Panthers quarterback Cam Newton all game long and the Broncos make enough big plays for a 24-10 victory, in what would be the last one of Peyton Manning's career. From Feb. 7, 2016.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.desc: Von Miller and the Denver defense torment Panthers quarterback Cam Newton all game long and the Broncos make enough big plays for a 24-10 victory, in what would be the last one of Peyton Manning's career. From Feb. 7, 2016.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: From Detroit to Notre Dame, Los Angeles to Pittsburgh and finally to Canton, a grand tour on the only "Bus" to stop at the Pro Football Hall of Fame.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: From Detroit to Notre Dame, Los Angeles to Pittsburgh and finally to Canton, a grand tour on the only "Bus" to stop at the Pro Football Hall of Fame.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jerome Bettis rushed for 101 yards and two touchdowns and Ben Roethlisberger was efficient against the NFL's top-ranked defense as the Pittsburgh Steelers posted a critical 21-9 victory over the Chicago Bears.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jerome Bettis rushed for 101 yards and two touchdowns and Ben Roethlisberger was efficient against the NFL's top-ranked defense as the Pittsburgh Steelers posted a critical 21-9 victory over the Chicago Bears.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: The Hall of Fame career of Calvin "Megatron" Johnson, one of the most dominant forces in NFL history; he explains why his early athletic career was cut short.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: The Hall of Fame career of Calvin "Megatron" Johnson, one of the most dominant forces in NFL history; he explains why his early athletic career was cut short.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Matthew Stafford threw one of four touchdown passes to Calvin Johnson and found the star receiver for a 57-yard play that set up Matt Prater's 27-yard field goal with 2:29 left in overtime, helping the Lions beat the Bears 37-34.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Matthew Stafford threw one of four touchdown passes to Calvin Johnson and found the star receiver for a 57-yard play that set up Matt Prater's 27-yard field goal with 2:29 left in overtime, helping the Lions beat the Bears 37-34.

programme.title: 2026 DAKAR Rally
programme.desc: Part race and part survival contest, just finishing is a victory in itself; spanning 14 days and 5,000 miles, this marathon off-road event is a test of endurance that rewards precision and punishes mistakes.

programme.title: GolfPass
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Three compete, but only two will move on to play for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Finalists compete in 18 holes of match play to determine the winner.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Sara Brown graced Golf Channel screens with strong runs at Big Break Sandals and Big Break Dominican Republic; she is running a family, occasionally herding preschoolers and being the ultimate team mom for her husband’s other successful squad.

programme.title: Nathalie Filler Sheehan: Breaking 100
programme.desc: Nathalie Filler Sheehan shows swing fixes and strategic tips from tee to green that will help drive scores below the century mark in no time.

programme.title: Martin Hall: Breaking 90
programme.desc: Martin Hall brings out all the tools and analogies to help fix swing faults and poor strategies that are holding players back from shooting in the 80s.

programme.title: Martin Chuck: Breaking 80
programme.desc: Martin Chuck is back with another breaking series where he will provide players with all the mental and physical tools they need to start shooting in the 70s consistently.

programme.title: Devan Bonebrake: Breaking Par
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake helps players break par with drills, strategies and by following Tiger's six metrics to breaking par, which Devan was taught by his mentor Joey Wuertemberger.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick talks about the underlying principle of distance -- clubhead speed -- and the keys to gaining more distance with the driver. McCormick also explains and demonstrates range of motion and speed development.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick, the 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year and coach to three-time major champion Jordan Spieth, unlocks the secrets to building a championship-caliber golf game.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick brings you inside his lab to scientifically prove how ground forces affect the golf swing. McCormick explains how to achieve maximum power with the lead leg and how to move properly through the swing with the trail leg.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: The most common problem for amateur golfers is the slice. Cameron McCormick, the 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year, tackles this issue by explaining how club delivery with the face and path dictates curve.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.sub-title: The Playbook - Snake in the Grass
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick moves to the putting green to teach the best strategies to making more putts and conquering the dreaded yips. McCormick explains the importance of the start line and how to gain control of the putter face for optimal control.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.sub-title: The Playbook - Foundation and Coordination for Juniors
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick, the 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year, unlocks the secrets to building a championship-caliber golf game.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick teaches the what and how behind the score-saving shots that amaze people who watch professional golf. Specialty shots take center stage as viewers learn how to execute the "Skid Spinner," "Super Flop," and the "Banker."

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick demonstrates how to execute difficult fairway bunker shots, dreaded mid-range bunker shots, and buried bunker lies.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top instruction tips from Debbie Doniger have been compiled to improve your game from tee-to-green; learn how to get more distance with the driver, chip the ball closer, improve from greenside bunkers and change your stance for solid contact.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top instruction tips from Aimee Cho have been compiled to improve your game from tee-to-green; learn the key 3-wood fundamentals, how to crush your longest drives, a secret to the flop shot and how to flush your long irons.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: Eliminate errors like a poor takeaway, swaying too much and chunking chips with these tips from Nathalie Sheehan; learn how to hit the perfect flop shot and putt like Tiger.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: How a hockey stick can simplify one of the most misunderstood terms in golf; advice from Tiger Woods about how to return to the game and avoid rusty play; a lesson on why golfers and football players should both be trying to find the end zone.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: How to make solid contact with long irons like Jack Nicklaus in the 1972 U.S. Open, stick wedges like Tiger Woods in the 2000 AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am, and crush fairway woods like Gary Woodland in the 2019 U.S. Open.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the setup and swing keys to driving it longer and straighter; Martin reveals how to add more power just by changing your grip; a swing tip from Annika Sorenstam; a lesson on how archery can improve your driving.

programme.title: School of Golf
